title: loxotrema davisii
side_effects: Loxotrema davisii can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, nausea, and respiratory problems. In some cases, prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can lead to liver damage, kidney failure, and even coma. Excessive consumption of the plant's extract can cause dizziness, headaches, and irregular heartbeat, while skin contact may result in severe irritation and blistering. If not handled and used correctly, loxotrema davisii can pose serious health risks to individuals who come into contact with it.
